title: Nutty Fluffy Apricot Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix Norwegian dish featuring nutty and fluffy textures from dried apricots and almonds in a simple stir-fry.
instructions: Toast the almonds in a dry skillet over medium heat until they are golden brown and fragrant, about 2-3 minutes.
Meanwhile, slice the dried apricots into small pieces if not already done.
In a wok or large frying pan, add a bit of oil (optional).
Add the toasted almonds to the pan followed by the sliced apricots and garlic powder. Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
Season with salt, then remove from heat and serve hot as a snack or light meal.
Optional: Serve with some fresh herbs for extra flavor.
